name: gelato-marketplace
description: Single-plugin marketplace for Gelato — the dogmatic Claude Code kit for modern full-stack TypeScript. A Neopolitan product.

plugins.name: gelato
plugins.description: The dogmatic, eval-verified Claude Code kit for modern full-stack TypeScript. 37 skills — 32 Core 1 (Web Dev) covering foundations, data, server, UI, testing, performance, SEO, security, observability, analytics, deployment, plus 5 Core 6 (Meta) covering Gelato's own skill / eval / plugin / marketplace / drift-workflow contracts. Each skill has methodology citations, deterministic classifier evals, and live LLM-as-judge rubrics.
